concerns.text: T012 (Power Analysis) is listed in Phase 2 (Foundational) but explicitly depends on T006.2 (Mock Generator) output. T006.2 is also in Phase 2. If T012 runs before T006.2 completes, it fails. Phase 2 tasks must be strictly ordered or T012 must be moved to Phase 3 (US1) where the data dependency is guaranteed.

T018 (Skip/Log Logic) is listed as the first task in Phase 3 Implementation, but T015.1 (Asset Generation) and T015 (Compositing) depend on the pipeline logic defined in T018. However, T018 itself depends on the existence of the manipulation functions in T015/T016 to 'skip' them. This creates a circular dependency: T018 needs T015/T016 to exist to test the skip logic, but T015/T016 are listed after T018. T018 should be a sub-task of T015/T016 or the order must be: Implement core logic (T015/T016) -> Implement error handling wrapper (T018).

T021 (Real Dataset Fetcher) is marked [P] (parallel-safe) and listed in Phase 3. However, T021 attempts to fetch real data which T006.3 (Mock Generator) explicitly says will raise a critical error if USE_REAL_DATA=True and fetch fails. T021 is a prerequisite for T015/T016 to have real data to manipulate, yet it is listed after the manipulation tasks. The data source (T021/T006.3) must precede the manipulation tasks (T015/T016).

T027 (Recognition Question Generator) depends on T017 (Stimulus Metadata Generation) as explicitly stated in the task description. T017 is in Phase 3 (US1), and T027 is in Phase 4 (US2). This ordering is correct. However, T027.1 (Mock Object Pool) is listed as a dependency for T027 but is not explicitly ordered before T027 in the task list, though it is in the same phase. Ensure T027.1 is executed before T027.

T035 (ANOVA) and T037 (Visualization) depend on data generated by US1 and US2. They are correctly placed in Phase 5. However, T038 (Dataset-variable fit check) depends on the complexity distribution stats from T006.2 (Phase 2) AND the actual data from US1/US2. The dependency chain is valid, but T038 should be ordered before T035 to ensure the data is valid before running the ANOVA.

T006 (Mock Visual Genome Generator) is split into T006.1, T006.2, T006.3. T006.3 (Conditional Loader) depends on T006.1 and T006.2. The current list order (T006.1, T006.2, T006.3) is correct, but the parent task T006 is marked [P] while its children have dependencies. T006 should not be marked [P] if it implies parallel execution of its children.
